text.title: Grafana — Deployment and Provisioning Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on platform + HA need + managed vs self-hosted.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: setup-provisioning
step.action: Lay out provisioning/* paths; wire into deployment.

step.name: plan-alloy-migration
step.action: Track Agent → Alloy migration with target date.

step.name: backup-and-drill-validate
step.action: Define backup target + frequency + drill cadence; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
